title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Emami Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Emami Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Emami Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Emami Digital Technologies:
Emami Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami Digital Technologies!
